label: Gen step orbital relay
description: Generates an orbital relay platform with a central prefab, satellite arms, and scattered prefabs.

centerPrefabs.label: Center prefabs
centerPrefabs.description: Weighted list of prefabs from which the central relay structure is chosen.

satellitePrefabs.label: Satellite prefabs
satellitePrefabs.description: Weighted list of prefabs used for the satellite arms extending from the relay.

scatterPrefabs.label: Scatter prefabs
scatterPrefabs.description: Weighted list of prefabs scattered around the relay structure.

satelliteRange.label: Satellite range
satelliteRange.description: Random range for the number of satellite arms to generate.

scatterRange.label: Scatter range
scatterRange.description: Random range for the number of scattered prefabs to place.
